creator: dv@kis.ru
text:
There is a problem in pppd. When client tries to use PAP while FreeBSD
server has PAP disbled, pppd on server says "Timeout Sending
Config-requests", but never hangup the line :(
Configs are ok. (normally it terminates the connection when Timeout) But
never is there is a PPP with PAP on other end :(

How-To-Repeat: 
(Try connecting to pppd with a bad PAP auth key, i suppose)
